mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, alert_id, action_type, action_by, action_note, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM alert_action WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alert_action ( tenant_id, alert_id, action_type, action_by, action_note ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{alertId}, #{actionType}, #{actionBy}, #{actionNote} )
